name: Golf Lounge 18
about: Golf Lounge 18 is a multi-location indoor golf facility that utilizes Trackman 4 technology in its simulator bays. The venues are designed for socializing and playing golf, featuring a full bar, food menu, and multiple HDTVs for watching sports. Reservations can be made online for members up to 21 days in advance and for non-members up to 7 days in advance, with walk-ins also welcome. The facilities host a variety of offerings including leagues, lessons, junior academies, and corporate or private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman 4 Dual Radar Technology for precise ball and club tracking
Access to over 450 world-famous golf courses for play and practice
Full bar and food menu available on-site for a complete social experience
Flexible hourly bay rates that can be split among groups
Welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels, from beginners to serious golfers

food_and_drink.notes: An expanded food menu is available, with catering options for events.
Facilities are equipped with a full bar serving drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar Technology, trusted by hundreds of pros

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue has its own full bar and an expanded food menu available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for completing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a Junior Academy for group instruction and clinics, making it suitable for children.
